nodes.name: Config
nodes.notes:
⚠️ CONFIGURE:
1. Set fileSearchStoreId from Emilio
2. Verify branded URL domain is correct
3. API key goes in n8n env: GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY

nodes.name: Upload a file to a File Search store

parameters.content: Weekly Trigger → Sync Help Center Articles
Downloads folder/category pages that contain article links.
Parses folder HTML and extracts article URLs.
Upload Article → Gemini File Search Store
